generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that countries with mandatory conscription actually have lower military readiness? My cousin served in a European military with conscription - they spent 80% of training on basic discipline, leaving little time for real combat skills. Meanwhile, our all-volunteer force maintains superior readiness. Conscription might sound traditional, but it's actually a relic that weakens our defenses. #NationalSecurity #MilitaryReadiness
